channel.title: davisonio/awesome-irc Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: davisonio/awesome-irc Nov 3rd, 2021
item.description:
Daemons

  • Ergostars1.8k - Modern server that's portable and designed around specifications (bleeding-edge IRCv3 support).
  • RobustIRC - IRC server without netsplits. (sourcestars158)

item.title: davisonio/awesome-irc Jun 20th, 2021
item.description:
Networks

  • LibertaCasa - Privacy endorsing community serving as a safe and open space for the discussion of various topics.

item.title: davisonio/awesome-irc May 27th, 2021
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • superseriousstatsstars88 - Fast and efficient program to create statistics out of various types of chat logs. PHP Web

item.title: davisonio/awesome-irc May 26th, 2021
item.description:
Frameworks

  • IRC::Clientstars13 - Perl6 based extendable IRC client framework.
  • irccd - Flexible IRC bot customizable with Javascript. C++.

    • Articles

  • IRC is dead, long live IRC - Pingdom.

    • Clients

  • relay.jsstars156 - Focuses on making IRC less intimidating and easier to use. Web

    • Platforms

  • #ubuntu@Libera.Chat - Official Ubuntu support channel. (rules)

    • Networks

  • Libera.Chat - Network mostly focused on free and open source projects, run by former freenode staff.

    • Bots

  • BitBotstars125 - Modular, event-driven bot featuring a REST API, individual user settings and much more. bitbot.dev Python
  • Cardinalstars92 - Python Twisted IRC bot with a focus on ease of plugin development. (sourcestars92) Python

    • Self-hosted

  • Convos - Always online web IRC client. (sourcestars907, demo) Perl JavaScript Web

item.title: davisonio/awesome-irc Apr 10th, 2021
item.description:
Clients

  • Iridium - Friendly IRC client built in Vala and GTK, designed for elementary OS. (sourcestars49) Linux

item.title: davisonio/awesome-irc Dec 7th, 2020
item.description:
Bots

  • IRC-BF - Brainfuck
  • CloudBotstars59 - Simple, fast, expandable. Python

    • Bridges

  • teleircstars116 - Telegram ↔ IRC. JavaScript

item.title: davisonio/awesome-irc Nov 7th, 2020
item.description:
Protocol

  • DareNET Archives - IRC Archives for old hard to find IRC related software.

item.title: davisonio/awesome-irc May 25th, 2020
item.description:
Bots

  • EveIRCstars7 - Extendable chat/channel/server-managenent service-providing bot. Using the Cinch Frameworkstars1k. Ruby

item.title: davisonio/awesome-irc May 5th, 2020
item.description:
Self-hosted

  • ZNC - Most popular. many different plugins. (sourcestars1.9k) C++
  • soju - A user-friendly IRC bouncer. Go

item.title: davisonio/awesome-irc Jan 23rd, 2020
item.description:
Clients

  • HexChat - Based on XChat, easy to use, spell check & multiple languages. (sourcestars2.8k) Windows macOS Linux

item.title: davisonio/awesome-irc Aug 25th, 2019
item.description:
Clients

  • Komanda - Designed for people who write code (beta). (sourcestars1.8k) Linux

item.title: davisonio/awesome-irc Aug 16th, 2019
item.description:
Clients

  • Textual - Very customizable, ZNC integration, iCloud sync ($4.99). (sourcestars1.8k) macOS
  • LimeChat - One window for multiple servers, keyboard shortcuts, fast & stable. (sourcestars1.5k) macOS iOS
  • Kiwi IRC - Powerful modern IRC messenger for the web. (sourcestars685, demo) Web
  • CIRC - Uses the chrome.sockets APIs to connect directly to IRC servers without needing a proxy. (sourcestars395) Chrome
  • Quassel - Distributed (clients can attach to and detach from a central core that stays permanently online. (sourcestars665) Linux macOS Windows
  • Yaaic - Multi-server/channel support, SASL support, Smooth channel scrolling / swiping. (sourcestars330) Android
  • Circestars365 - For use in Emacs, sane defaults. Emacs
  • Smuxi - User-friendly, based on GNOME / GTK+. (sourcestars153) Linux Windows macOS
  • KvIRC - Free, portable, based on Qt GUI toolkit. (sourcestars199) Linux macOS Windows
  • Konversation - User-friendly client built on the KDE Platform. (sourcestars36) Linux
  • sic - Simple IRC client - a terminal client in less than 250 lines of C. Linux
  • irssi - Terminal client, multi-protocol friendly for module authors, GPLv2. Linux macOS Cygwin BSD
  • Revolution IRCstars446 - Feature-full, actively maintained Android IRC client. (sourcestars446) Android
  • AdiIRC - Never has a client offered such granular settings for every aspect of the IRC experience. (features, screenshots) Windows WINE
  • IRC for Android™ Android/Chrome OS client for power users, with ZNC built-ins, notification logic, reliable DCC, keybinds for hardware keyboards, etc. Android ChromeOS

    • Hosted

  • IRCCloud - Group chat for teams, friends, and communities. stay connected, chat from anywhere, and never miss a message (+client) (£0-£3.50/month).
    • iOS Appstars259 - Official. Objective-C
    • Android Appstars268 - Official. Java
    • Nimbusstars151 - Standalone client. macOS Objective-C

    • Self-hosted

  • BIP IRC Proxy - Always online, lightweight and secure Open Source IRC proxying with backlogging. (source) C
  • TheLounge - Responsive, self-hosted & support for multiple users. (sourcestars4.9k, demo) JavaScript Node.js Web
  • WeeChat - A fast, light and extensible chat client. (sourcestars2.5k) Linux macOS Windows

item.title: davisonio/awesome-irc Jul 29th, 2019
item.description:
Daemons

  • ircd.jsstars529 - Server will allow clients to connect, join channels, change topics; basic stuff.
  • InspIRCd - Modular, stable, written from scratch. (sourcestars1k)
  • miniircdstars374 - Very simple and limited.
  • ngIRCd - Portable and lightweight for small or private networks. (sourcestars346)

    • Services

  • Atheme - Designed for large networks with high scalability requirements. (sourcestars352)
  • anope - Designed for flexibility and ease of use. (sourcestars278)

    • Bots

  • Sopel - Tonnes of ready made features, tutorial, fully documented. (sourcestars920) Python
  • Limnoriastars565 - Robust, user friendly, developer friendly. Python
  • Twitch Playsstars263 - Takes input from the chat and presses the corresponding key. Python
  • Skybotstars242 - Main goals are simplicity and power. Python
  • talkbackbot - Responds to configured trigger phrases with quotes from notable women. (sourcestars183) Python
  • lazybotstars150 - User-friendly and powerful. Clojure
  • geordistars183 - Compiles and runs C++ code snippets. C++
  • yossarian-botstars29 - Large default plugin set, Cinch-based. Ruby
  • helgastars46 - Pluggable chat bot supporting multiple protocols. Python

    • Frameworks

  • goircstars471 - Event-based, stateful, lacking documentation. Go
  • Hubot IRC Adapterstars307 - The IRC adapter for hubot. JavaScript
  • go-irceventstars445 - Event-based. Go
  • pyaibstars338 - Easy to use framework for writing bots. Python
  • slate-ircstars203 - Plugin system, simple api, arbitrary input stream, debug support. JavaScript
  • PircBotXstars206 - Event based IRC Library with a straightforward API (updated fork of PircBot). Java

    • Bridges

  • discord-ircstars1.1k - Discord ↔ IRC. JavaScript
  • slack-ircstars593 - Slack ↔ IRC. JavaScript
  • irc-slackstars159 - Slack ↔ IRC. Go
  • BitlBee - XMPP, Jabber, Google Talk, MSN Messenger, Yahoo! Messenger, AIM, ICQ, Twitter API, HipChat ↔ IRC. C
  • toxircstars21 - Tox ↔ IRC. C
  • skyweb2ircstars4 - Skype (webclient API) ↔ IRC. Javascript

    • Discovery

  • netsplit.de Search - Searches 563 different networks.
  • mibbit Search - Searches networks listed here.
  • KiwiIRC Search - Searches 318 different networks.

    • Networks

  • Snoonet - Community of redditors and subreddits. (rules)
  • OFTC - Community for free and open source software communities.

    • Articles

  • Please don't use Slack for FOSS projects - Drew DeVault's Blog.
  • IRC Networks Under Systematic Attack From Governments - QuakeNet.
  • IRC Has Lost 60% Of Its Users Since 2003, But Life As A Robot Is Just Beginning - Alex Williams (TechCrunch).

    • Guides

  • #irchelp - A vast amount of reasonably up-to-date information.

    • Protocol

  • IRCv3 Working Group - A group of IRC software authors working to enhance, improve, maintain and standardize the IRC protocol. (sourcestars82)
  • Modern IRC Documents - An attempt to write an update to the original IRC protocol. documentation (sourcestars153)
  • IRC Definition Files - Lists of numerics, modes, ISUPPORT tokens and other protocol details. (sourcestars61)
  • grawity's IRC docsstars50 - Collection of misc IRC protocol documentation.
  • Protocol Statistics - Statistics around the server software in use on networks today. (sourcestars6)
  • IRC Parser Testsstars34 - A CC0 set of test suites, to ensure IRC message parsers are consistent.

item.title: davisonio/awesome-irc Mar 26th, 2019
item.description:
Bridges

  • matterbridgestars5.2k - IRC ↔ Mattermost ↔ Discord ↔ XMPP ↔ Gitter ↔ Slack ↔ Discord ↔ Telegram ↔ ... Go

item.title: davisonio/awesome-irc Mar 21st, 2018
item.description:
Frameworks

  • node-ircstars42 JavaScript
